ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spells" (
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spell */,
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* ID representing the difficulty level of the spell */,
  "casting_time_index" INTEGER /* Index indicating the casting time of the spell */,
  "duration_index" INTEGER /* Index indicating the duration of the spell's effect */,
  "range_index" INTEGER /* Index indicating the range of the spell */,
  "school_mask" INTEGER /* Bitmask indicating the school of magic to which the spell belongs */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed at which the spell travels or is executed */,
  "launch_delay" INTEGER /* Delay before the spell is launched */,
  "min_duration" INTEGER /* Minimum duration of the spell effect */,
  "spell_icon_file_data_id" INTEGER /* ID for the spell's icon file */,
  "active_icon_file_data_id" INTEGER /* ID for the active icon that displays when the spell is in use */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the spell */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spell */,
  "cooldown" INTEGER /* Cooldown time for the spell */,
  "mana_cost" INTEGER /* Mana cost to cast the spell */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the spell is enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spells_range_index FOREIGN KEY ("range_index") REFERENCES ranges ("range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spells_spell_icon_file_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("spell_icon_file_data_id") REFERENCES icon_files ("file_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spells_difficulty_id FOREIGN KEY ("difficulty_id") REFERENCES difficulties ("difficulty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spells_casting_time_index FOREIGN KEY ("casting_time_index") REFERENCES casting_times ("casting_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spells_duration_index FOREIGN KEY ("duration_index") REFERENCES durations ("duration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spells_active_icon_file_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("active_icon_file_data_id") REFERENCES icon_files ("file_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "difficulties" (
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for difficulty levels */,
  "difficulty_description" TEXT /* Description of the difficulty level (e.g., Easy, Medium, Hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difficulty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casting_times" (
  "casting_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for casting times */,
  "casting_time_description" TEXT /* Description of the casting time (e.g., Instant, 1 second, 2 seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("casting_time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "durations" (
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for durations */,
  "duration_description" TEXT /* Description of the duration (e.g., 5 seconds, 10 seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for ranges */,
  "range_description" TEXT /* Description of the range (e.g., Close, Medium, Far) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icon_files" (
  "file_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each icon file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the icon file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spell_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the attribute */,
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spell this attribute is associated with */,
  "attribute_value" INTEGER /* Value of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spell_attributes_spell_id FOREIGN KEY ("spell_id") REFERENCES spells ("spell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spell_schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the school of magic */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school of magic */,
  "school_description" TEXT /* Description of the school of magic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spell_school_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the membership */,
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spell */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school of magic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_spells" (
  "user_spell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user's spell */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spell */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the spell for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_spell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spell_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the spell */,
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spell that was cast */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the spell was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spell_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analytics entry */,
  "spell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spell */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the spell has been used */,
  "average_cast_time" REAL /* Average time it takes to cast the spell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)
